## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.15.16

This prerelease tightens the package reintegration install path.

### Changed

- Bundles the reviewed `wheemer-python-xsense==0.1.0.dev2026070501` package snapshot inside the integration.
- Removes the direct GitHub wheel requirement from `manifest.json` so Home Assistant does not have to install that wheel while wrapping up startup.

### Validation

- Keeps the integration imports pointed at the same reviewed package API surface.
- Adds release metadata coverage to prevent reintroducing the direct wheel requirement.
